html:
Sonicare Compatible Refills

Keep your electric routine — ditch the plastic-heavy habit

Swap, click, brush.
These bamboo electric toothbrush heads are designed to fit most Philips Sonicare click-on handles, so you can keep what works while reducing everyday oral care waste.

Bamboo handle • Bio-based bristles • 4-pack convenience
Shop Bamboo Heads

Always mindfully packaged without plastic

Key Benefits

Compatible with most Sonicare click-on models Charcoal-infused castor oil bristles Inherently antimicrobial bamboo Dentist-recommended 3-month swap cycle

Why switch

Electric brushing, with a lower-waste refill

If you love your electric toothbrush performance but want a more mindful refill option, these heads are an easy step forward.

The bamboo base and bio-based bristles are designed for everyday use while helping you reduce plastic-heavy swaps.

Why people choose this refill:

  • ✓ Fits most Philips Sonicare click-on toothbrushes
  • ✓ Castor oil and charcoal bristles for daily brushing
  • ✓ Renewable bamboo body with inherent antimicrobial properties
  • ✓ Easy 4-pack for routine head replacements
  • ✓ Packed in kraft paper instead of plastic clamshells
Shop Bamboo Heads

Refill Rhythm

4
Heads
12
Months*

*Based on replacing one head every 3 months.

How it works

3 simple steps to swap and brush

1

Remove standard head

Pull off your current Sonicare click-on replacement head from the handle.

2

Click in refill

Press in the bamboo refill head until securely attached and ready for vibration.

3

Replace every 3 months

Keep your oral care routine effective by changing to a fresh head each quarter.

Shop Bamboo Heads

Where it shines

Made for your daily oral care routine

Everyday brushing

A simple refill for people who already prefer the feel of electric brushing.

Lower-waste swaps

Choose a refill with renewable bamboo and paper-based packaging.

Easy compatibility check

Best for Philips Sonicare click-on models; a 1-pk tester option is available.

Shop Bamboo Heads

Features & benefits

Built for performance and mindful design

Sonicare click-on compatible

Designed to fit most Philips Sonicare click-on electric toothbrush handles, including 9-series models.

Bio-based bristles

Medium/soft bristles are made from castor oil and blended with charcoal.

Renewable bamboo body

Bamboo is a fast-growing renewable resource with inherent antimicrobial properties.

Functional PLA insert

The bottom insert is made from cornstarch PLA and helps the metal connection vibrate effectively.

Convenient 4-pack

Four refill heads in one purchase helps you stay stocked for regular replacement intervals.

Kraft paper packaging

Refill heads are packed in a kraft paper box for a more mindful unboxing experience.

Shop Bamboo Heads

What customers say

A cleaner swap for electric brush users

Perfect fit

★★★★★

"Snapped right onto my Sonicare handle and feels great. Love having a less wasteful option without giving up my electric toothbrush."

— Marissa T.

Quality bristles

Shop Bamboo Heads

Technical transparency

Materials and compatibility details

Designed as a compatible refill for most Sonicare click-on brushes while prioritizing renewable and bio-based materials where possible.

Bristles

Made from castor oil and infused with charcoal. Medium/soft feel for regular brushing.

Insert material

Cornstarch PLA insert at the base helps maintain fit and vibration performance.

Compatibility note

Fits most Philips Sonicare click-on models. Not compatible with screw-on, specialty models, or Oral-B.

Replacement guide

When to change your toothbrush head

Dentists typically recommend replacing your toothbrush head every 3 months for best performance.

Month 1 — Fresh head

Month 2 — Daily use

Month 3 — Time to replace

FAQ

Questions about bamboo electric toothbrush heads

Quick answers before you choose your refill pack.

Will these fit my Philips Sonicare brush? +

They fit most Sonicare click-on models, including 9-series. They do not fit screw-on or specialty models, and are not compatible with Oral-B.

How often should I replace the head? +

Most dentists recommend replacing your toothbrush head every 3 months.

What are the bristles made from? +

The medium/soft bristles are made from castor oil and blended with charcoal.

Shop Bamboo Heads

Always mindfully packaged without plastic.

Keep your electric brushing routine while choosing refill heads with more mindful materials and packaging.

Make the switch to bamboo electric toothbrush heads

Shop Bamboo Heads
